Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course covers 'The psychological basis of HCI' and 'Laws of Human Factors engineering', which are crucial for designing user-friendly interfaces that can reduce stress and cognitive load, contributing to mental well-being (Target 3.4). BCI also has potential health applications.

evidence: Apply course content to professional design and production
